intro: Steam drifts up from a natural spring tucked into the mountainside. An old keeper tends the pools and waves you over with a knowing smile.
title: The Hot Spring
description: A warm mountain spring where a weary team can soak and recover. Pay the keeper's modest fee to fully restore your whole party, or move on and keep your coin.

1.label: Soak ({{money, money}})
1.tooltip:
(+) Fully restore the whole party (HP, status, PP, revive)
(-) Costs a modest fee
1.selected: You pay the keeper and ease your team into the warm water...

2.label: Move on
2.selected: You nod to the keeper and continue up the trail.

soaked: The warm spring works wonders - your whole party is fully restored!
